    Index

    A C D E G H I L M O P R S T 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    O

    onCardDrawn(Player, Card) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameScreenController
     
    onCardDrawn(Player, Card) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameEventListener
    Fired after a player has drawn a replacement card from the deck.
    onCardDrawn(Player, Card) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.observer.GameEventListener
    Fired after a player has drawn a replacement card from the deck.
    onCardPlayed(Player, Card, int) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameScreenController
     
    onCardPlayed(Player, Card, int) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameEventListener
    Fired after a player has successfully played a card onto the table.
    onCardPlayed(Player, Card, int) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.observer.GameEventListener
    Fired after a player has successfully played a card onto the table.
    onDeckRefreshed(int) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameScreenController
     
    onDeckRefreshed(int) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameEventListener
    Fired when the deck runs out of cards and is refilled by reshuffling the table pile (excluding the top card).
    onDeckRefreshed(int) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.observer.GameEventListener
    Fired when the deck runs out of cards and is refilled by reshuffling the table pile (excluding the top card).
    onGameOver(Player) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameScreenController
     
    onGameOver(Player) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameEventListener
    Fired when only one player remains and the game is over.
    onGameOver(Player) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.observer.GameEventListener
    Fired when only one player remains and the game is over.
    onGameStarted(int) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameScreenController
     
    onGameStarted(int) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameEventListener
    Fired once after the game has been fully set up: all players have received their 4 starting cards and the initial table card has been placed.
    onGameStarted(int) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.observer.GameEventListener
    Fired once after the game has been fully set up: all players have received their 4 starting cards and the initial table card has been placed.
    onHumanTurnCompleted() - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.model.TurnManager
    Notifies the TurnManager that the human player has completed their turn.
    onInvalidPlay(Player, Card, int) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameScreenController
     
    onInvalidPlay(Player, Card, int) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameEventListener
    Fired when an attempt to play an invalid card is detected (mainly relevant for the human player's GUI interaction).
    onInvalidPlay(Player, Card, int) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.observer.GameEventListener
    Fired when an attempt to play an invalid card is detected (mainly relevant for the human player's GUI interaction).
    onPlayerEliminated(Player) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameScreenController
     
    onPlayerEliminated(Player) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameEventListener
    Fired when a player is eliminated because none of their cards can be played without exceeding a table sum of 50.
    onPlayerEliminated(Player) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.observer.GameEventListener
    Fired when a player is eliminated because none of their cards can be played without exceeding a table sum of 50.
    onTurnStarted(Player) - Method in class com.example.elcincuentazo.controller.GameScreenController
     
    onTurnStarted(Player) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.model.GameEventListener
    Fired at the beginning of a player's turn so the View can highlight the active player and enable / disable controls.
    onTurnStarted(Player) - Method in interface com.example.elcincuentazo.observer.GameEventListener
    Fired at the beginning of a player's turn so the View can highlight the active player and enable / disable controls.
